name: Australis Oil & Gas Limited
description: Australis Oil & Gas Limited is an Australia-based oil and gas company. The Company is engaged in the acquisition, exploration, development, and production of oil and gas properties. Its primary focus is on the Tuscaloosa Marine Shale (TMS) play in the United States, where it holds a significant acreage position and operates producing oil wells. The Company is dedicated to creating shareholder value through the strategic development of its onshore oil and gas assets in North America.
